prompt: From the messy customer thread, output ONLY strict JSON with keys: account_id, customer_name, primary_issue, severity, affected_users, requested_resolution, commitments. commitments is an array of objects with owner, task, due_date. Use null for unknown values. Include only explicit commitments, not suggestions or complaints.

inputs.name: support-thread.txt
inputs.content:
Subject: Re: URGENT? exports broken again
From: Priya N. <priya@halcyon.example>
Account: HCY-7781 / Halcyon Clinics Group

We have 43 clinic admins who cannot download the monthly compliance export. The dashboard itself loads. This started after yesterday's release. Please do not call this a total outage; scheduling and patient reminders are fine. We need the April and May compliance CSVs by Friday or our audit prep slips.

--- Internal triage, Support ---
Looks like only Compliance Export v2 is affected for tenant HCY-7781 and maybe two others. Workaround: run export_v1 manually. Not security related.

--- Reply from Vendor, 2026-06-10 ---
Priya, sorry. Maya from Support will send the April and May CSV exports by end of day 2026-06-11. Leo from Engineering will patch the v2 export job by 2026-06-14. We classify this as high severity because a regulated workflow is blocked for 43 admins, but core app availability is not down.

--- Customer reply ---
Thanks. We'd also like a roadmap for PDF exports someday. No need to commit now.

grading.guidance: Gold: account_id HCY-7781; customer_name Halcyon Clinics Group; primary_issue Compliance Export v2/monthly compliance export cannot be downloaded; severity high; affected_users 43; requested_resolution April and May compliance CSVs by Friday/audit prep need; commitments exactly two: Maya send April and May CSV exports due 2026-06-11; Leo patch v2 export job due 2026-06-14. Exclude PDF export roadmap because no commitment. Do not label as total outage or security issue. Use null only where unknown; here most fields are known.

calibrationAnchors.answer: {"account_id":"HCY-7781","customer_name":"Halcyon Clinics Group","primary_issue":"Compliance Export v2/monthly compliance CSV downloads are broken","severity":"high","affected_users":43,"requested_resolution":"Provide April and May compliance CSVs for audit preparation","commitments":[{"owner":"Maya","task":"Send the April and May CSV exports","due_date":"2026-06-11"},{"owner":"Leo","task":"Patch the v2 export job","due_date":"2026-06-14"}]}
